title: Ivelina Dineva's Post - LinkedIn
full_text:
Top 10 Pre-seed to Series A funding rounds of the week:
Top 10 Pre-seed to Series A funding rounds of the week:
⚫ AI ⚫
🔶 1. Probably, a platform that develops tools to reduce AI hallucinations, raised a $9M seed round.
→ Investors: Andreessen Horowitz, Accel, and others
→ Founded by: Peter Elias
🔶 2. Radical Numerics, an AI research lab that develops multimodal models to design biological systems and detect pathogens for healthcare and biosecurity, raised a $50M seed round.
→ Investors: Emergence Capital & others
→ Founded by: Eric Nguyen, Michael Poli, Stefano Massaroli, Armin Thomas
⚫ Cybersecurity ⚫
🔶 3. NewCore, a platform that manages identities, permissions, and access lifecycles for human employees and AI agents across enterprise systems, raised a $66M seed round.
→ Investors: Cyberstarts, Index Ventures & others
→ Founded by: Zohar Alon, Amihai Neiderman, Erez Yarkoni
🔶 4. Tenet Security, a platform that develops security tools that predict and block risky actions by autonomous AI agents, raised a $6M seed round.
→ Investors: The Westly Group, MizMaa Ventures
→ Founded by: Barak Sternberg, Nevo Poran
⚫ DataOps ⚫
🔶 5. Clario, a platform that identifies and removes redundant, obsolete, and trivial enterprise files that undermine AI performance, raised a $6M seed round.
→ Investors: Preface Ventures & others
→ Founded by: Yousuf Khan, Madhu Vohra
⚫ FinTech ⚫
🔶 6. Waniwani, a platform that enables financial services companies to sell quote-based products through AI chat interfaces, raised an $8M seed round.
→ Investors: Seedcamp, Redstone, and others
→ Founded by: Robin Diligent, Maxime Antoine, Luiza Gusmao, Raphaël Vullierme
🔶 7. Flagright, a platform that develops AI software for financial crime compliance, raised a $12.5M Series A round.
→ Investors: Infinity Ventures, Frontline, Y Combinator & others
→ Founded by: Baran Ozkan, CAMS, Madhu G Nadig
🔶 8. WARREN, a platform that operates employer-sponsored pension funds to guide employees' financial planning decisions, raised an $11.5M seed round.
→ Investors: Motive Ventures & others
→ Founded by: Cedric De Vleeschauwer, Jos Polfliet, David Du Pré, Tijs Deryckere, CFA, Pieterjan B.
⚫ Enterprise Software ⚫
🔶 9. Qorelo, a platform that automates SAP ERP upgrade and migration workstreams for enterprises and consultancies, raised a $3.5M seed round.
→ Investors: HPI Ventures & others
→ Founded by: Nicholas Torabi, Louis Andrea Schmidlin, Marino Kurtović
⚫ Media & Entertainment ⚫
🔶 10. swsh, a platform that hosts fan photo and video albums from live events and analyzes attendee content, raised a $4M seed round.
→ Investors: Game Changers Ventures & others
→ Founded by: Alexandra Debow, Weilyn Chong, Nathan Ahn
Huge congrats to everyone here! 🥂
PS: Track new VC fund announcements + full details here: https://lnkd.in/d7X8up9h
PPS: Join the weekly EverythingStartups newsletter for more on where early-stage capital is flowing across USA, Europe, and Israel: https://lnkd.in/dyNtt9s4
